human_summary: Usually requires at least £31,300 or the lower going rate, whichever is higher.
Discounts use the lower going rate, not the standard going rate.
If the job is on the Immigration Salary List, other discounted salary rates cannot be used.
New entrant and postdoctoral discounted routes have a 4 year total stay limit.

casework_salary_actions_rqf6_table_1.Salary: At least: - £41,700 - the full pro-rated going rate
casework_salary_actions_rqf6_table_1.Casework action: - award 20 points for salary alone (option A) - no need to consider other tradeable points options

casework_salary_actions_rqf6_table_1.Salary: At least: - £37,500 - 90% of the pro-rated going rate
casework_salary_actions_rqf6_table_1.Casework action: - does the applicant have a relevant PhD? (option B) - does the applicant have a relevant STEM PhD? (option C) - is the job on the Immigration Salary List (ISL)? (option D) - is the applicant a new entrant? (option E)

casework_salary_actions_rqf6_table_1.Salary: At least: - £33,400 - 80% of the pro-rated going rate
casework_salary_actions_rqf6_table_1.Casework action: - does the applicant have a relevant STEM PhD? (option C) - is the job on the Immigration Salary List (ISL)? (option D) - is the applicant a new entrant? (option E)

casework_salary_actions_rqf6_table_1.Salary: At least: - £33,400 - the full pro-rated going rate for the SOC2020 occupation code
casework_salary_actions_rqf6_table_1.Casework action: - is the job on the Immigration Salary List (ISL)? (option D) - is the applicant a new entrant? (option E)

casework_salary_actions_rqf6_table_1.Salary: At least: - £33,400 - 70% of the pro-rated going rate
casework_salary_actions_rqf6_table_1.Casework action: - is the applicant a new entrant? (option E)
- the applicant cannot score tradeable points (you must also refuse under option K due to the job not being in an eligible occupation)

casework_salary_actions_rqf3_table_2.Salary: At least: - £31,300; and - the full pro-rated going rate for the SOC2020 occupation code
casework_salary_actions_rqf3_table_2.Casework action: - award 20 points for salary alone (option F) - no need to consider other tradeable points options

casework_salary_actions_rqf3_table_2.Salary: At least: - £28,200 - 90% of the pro-rated going rate
casework_salary_actions_rqf3_table_2.Casework action: - does the applicant have a relevant PhD? (option G) - does the applicant have a relevant STEM PhD? (option H) - is the job on the Immigration Salary List (ISL)? (option I) - is the applicant a new entrant? (option J)

casework_salary_actions_rqf3_table_2.Salary: At least: - £25,000 - 80% of the pro-rated going rate
casework_salary_actions_rqf3_table_2.Casework action: - does the applicant have a relevant STEM PhD? (option H) - is the job on the Immigration Salary List (ISL)? (option I) - is the applicant a new entrant? (option J)

casework_salary_actions_rqf3_table_2.Salary: At least: - £25,000 - the full pro-rated going rate for the SOC2020 occupation code
casework_salary_actions_rqf3_table_2.Casework action: - is the job on the Immigration Salary List (ISL)? (option I) - is the applicant a new entrant? (option J)

casework_salary_actions_rqf3_table_2.Salary: At least: - £25,000 - 70% of the pro-rated going rate
casework_salary_actions_rqf3_table_2.Casework action: - is the applicant a new entrant? (option J)
- the applicant cannot score tradeable points (you must also refuse under option K due to the job not being in an eligible occupation)

casework_salary_actions_health_education.Salary: At least: <br - £25,000 - the full pro-rated going rate
casework_salary_actions_health_education.Casework action: - award 20 points for a job in a listed health or education occupation - salary (option K) - no need to consider other tradeable points options

- if the applicant is sponsored as a nurse or midwife, their salary may be temporarily (for up to 8 months) less than £25,000 per year, but only if the conditions set out in paragraph SW 13.2. to SW 13.3. are met - the applicant cannot score tradeable points in other circumstances

phd_ecctis_outcomes.What it means: Qualification is genuine and meets the standard of a UK PhD.
phd_ecctis_outcomes.Casework action: Award tradeable points for the qualification.

phd_ecctis_outcomes.Outcome: ‘Verified as genuine’ and any other equivalency
phd_ecctis_outcomes.What it means: Qualification is genuine but does not meet the standard of a UK PhD.
phd_ecctis_outcomes.Casework action: Award 0 tradeable points for the qualification.

phd_ecctis_outcomes.What it means: Qualification may or may not be genuine.
phd_ecctis_outcomes.Casework action: Request evidence of the qualification from the applicant. Consider inviting the applicant to interview.

phd_ecctis_outcomes.What it means: Applicant does not have the qualification.
phd_ecctis_outcomes.Casework action: Award 0 tradeable points for the qualification. Refer to guidance on false representations.

phd_ecctis_outcomes.What it means: Applicant has requested the English language checking service from Ecctis, rather than the PhD checking service.
phd_ecctis_outcomes.Casework action: Request the correct Ecctis check – contact both the applicant and their sponsor.

new_entrant_criteria.New entrant criteria: Applicant is under 26 on the date of application.

Applicant is sponsored for a post-doctoral position in one of the following occupations: - 2111 Chemical scientists - 2112 Biological scientists - 2113 Biochemists - biomedical scientists - 2114 Physical scientists - 2115 Social - humanities scientists - 2119 Natural - social science professionals not elsewhere classified - 2162 Other researchers, unspecified discipline - 2311 Higher education teaching professionals
new_entrant_criteria.Information required from sponsor: Check the occupation code on the certificate of sponsorship. The job title or description must confirm it is a post-doctoral position.

new_entrant_criteria.New entrant criteria: Applicant is working towards a recognised UK professional qualification in a UK-regulated profession.
new_entrant_criteria.Information required from sponsor: If necessary, you can check the UK regulated profession list to confirm whether the job is in a UK-regulated profession. You should request further job details from the sponsor if the sponsor has stated the applicant is working towards a UK professional qualification and it is unclear whether the job is in a UK-regulated profession. The sponsor must confirm which recognised professional qualification the applicant is working towards – this must be a UK qualification accepted by the regulatory body for the profession.

new_entrant_criteria.New entrant criteria: Applicant is working towards full registration or chartered status with the relevant professional body for the job they are sponsored for.
new_entrant_criteria.Information required from sponsor: The sponsor must confirm who the relevant professional body is and that the applicant is working towards full registration or chartered status. If necessary, you can check the list of chartered bodies from the Privy Council.

new_entrant_criteria.New entrant criteria: Applicant’s most recent permission, other than as a visitor, was under Tier 4 (General) or the Student route. The permission must either be current or have expired less than 2 years before the date of application. In that permission (or previous) permission, the applicant must have been sponsored to study one of the following courses (not any other qualifications of an equivalent level): - a UK bachelor’s degree - a UK master’s degree - a UK PhD or other doctoral qualification - a Postgraduate Certificate in Education - a Professional Graduate Diploma of Education The applicant must have completed (or be applying no more than 3 months before they are expected to complete) the course. An exception applies to PhDs and other doctoral qualifications, where the applicant must have completed at least 12 months’ study in the UK towards the qualification.
new_entrant_criteria.Information required from sponsor: Confirmation (from the applicant or their sponsor) the applicant has completed (or the date they are expected to complete) their course, or they have completed at least 12 months’ study in the UK towards a PhD or other doctoral qualification. Check the applicant’s immigration history for other information.

new_entrant_criteria.New entrant criteria: Applicant’s most recent permission, other than as a visitor, was under the Graduate route. The permission must either be current or have expired less than 2 years before the date of application.
new_entrant_criteria.Information required from sponsor: None – check the applicant’s immigration history.

settlement_salary_options.Applicant’s circumstances: All cases where rows B to E do not apply.
settlement_salary_options.General salary: Salary of at least £41,700 per year
settlement_salary_options.Going rate: At least the relevant going rate listed in Tables 1 to 1a of Appendix Skilled Occupations

settlement_salary_options.Applicant’s circumstances: The applicant was sponsored in their most recent permission for a job in Appendix Immigration Salary List, and rows C to E do not apply.
settlement_salary_options.General salary: Salary of at least £33,400 per year
settlement_salary_options.Going rate: At least the relevant going rate listed in Tables 1 to 1a of Appendix Skilled Occupations

settlement_salary_options.Applicant’s circumstances: The applicant meets the requirements of SW 4.2(b), save that references to being sponsored should be read as meeting the requirements in SW 24.1. to SW 24.2, and rows D and E do not apply.
settlement_salary_options.General salary: Salary of at least £31,300 per year
settlement_salary_options.Going rate: At least the relevant going rate listed in Tables 2 to 2a of Appendix Skilled Occupations

settlement_salary_options.Applicant’s circumstances: The applicant was sponsored in their most recent permission for a job in either: Appendix Immigration Salary List (or the previous Appendix Shortage Occupation List), and the applicant meets the requirements of SW 4.2(b), save that references to being sponsored should be read as meeting the requirements in SW 24.1. to SW 24.2 a health or education SOC 2020 occupation code listed in Table 3 of Appendix Skilled Occupations (or a related SOC 2010 occupation code shown in that table) and, in either case, row E does not apply.
settlement_salary_options.General salary: Salary of at least £25,000 per year
settlement_salary_options.Going rate: At least the relevant going rate listed in Tables 2 to 5 of Appendix Skilled Occupations

settlement_salary_options.Applicant’s circumstances: The 5-year qualifying period for settlement includes time as a Tier 2 (General) Migrant in which the applicant was sponsored for a job in one of the following SOC 2010 occupation codes: - 2111 Chemical scientists - 2112 Biological scientists and biochemists - 2113 Physical scientists - 2114 Social and humanities scientists - 2119 Natural and social science professionals not elsewhere classified - 2150 Research and development managers - 2311 Higher education teaching professionals
settlement_salary_options.General salary: Salary of at least £25,000 per year
settlement_salary_options.Going rate: At least the going rate in the table at SW 14.5(c), if the applicant has continued to be sponsored in that SOC 2010 occupation code, or the equivalent SOC 2020 occupation code shown in Table 2 of Appendix Skilled Occupations, ever since. At least the relevant going rate in Tables 2 to 5 of Appendix Skilled Occupations, in other cases.

core_options.A: RQF6 salary only: £41,700 and full pro-rated going rate.
core_options.B: RQF6 relevant PhD: £37,500 and 90% of pro-rated going rate.
core_options.C: RQF6 relevant STEM PhD: £33,400 and 80% of pro-rated going rate.
core_options.D: RQF6 Immigration Salary List: £33,400 and full pro-rated going rate.
core_options.E: RQF6 new entrant: £33,400 and 70% of pro-rated going rate.
core_options.F: RQF3 salary only: £31,300 and full pro-rated lower going rate.
core_options.G: RQF3 relevant PhD: £28,200 and 90% of pro-rated lower going rate.
core_options.H: RQF3 relevant STEM PhD: £25,000 and 80% of pro-rated lower going rate.
core_options.I: RQF3 Immigration Salary List: £25,000 and full pro-rated lower going rate.
core_options.J: RQF3 new entrant: £25,000 and 70% of pro-rated lower going rate.
core_options.K: Listed health or education occupation: £25,000 and full pro-rated national pay scale going rate.
